class ListNode:
    def __init__(self, val=0, next=None):
        self.val = val
        self.next = next

def swapPairs(head):
    dummy = ListNode(0)
    dummy.next = head
    current = dummy

    while current.next and current.next.next:
        first = current.next
        second = current.next.next

        current.next = second
        first.next = second.next
        second.next = first

        current = first

    return dummy.next
